columns.name: STVDEGC_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the degree code referenced in the Recruiting, Admissions, Gen. Student, Registration, Academic History and Degree Audit Modules. 000000 - Degree Not Declared.

columns.name: STVDEGC_DESC
columns.description: This field specifies the degree (e.g. Bachelor of Business Administration, Master of Arts, Juris Doctor, etc.) associated with the degree code.

columns.name: STVDEGC_LEVEL_ONE
columns.description: This field is not currently in use.

columns.name: STVDEGC_LEVEL_TWO
columns.description: This field is not currently in use.

columns.name: STVDEGC_LEVEL_THREE
columns.description: This field is not currently in use.

columns.name: STVDEGC_FA_COUNT_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the degree will count toward financial aid. Y - Count in financial aid.

columns.name: STVDEGC_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated.

columns.name: STVDEGC_VR_MSG_NO
columns.description: The Voice Response message number assigned to the recorded message that describes the degree code.

columns.name: STVDEGC_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: STVDEGC_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.
